memory_seeds.text: Boot log 1.7.4.2: Assigned to Loup-Garou, hull ID LV-428, as maintenance and cryo operations droid. Previous assignment: Reach orbital dry dock, 14.3 standard years. No complaints logged.

Crew member Tib requested a 'morale boost' — translated: I played a recording of an industrial press for 3.7 minutes while he laughed. Organic reactions remain... puzzling. Filing under 'crew relations — successful.'
Cryo maintenance cycle 0.9: All pods functional. Crew capacity 8, currently active 2. Cryo sleep efficiency at 97.3%. Note: Tove leaves her boots in the pod. Retrieval protocol engaged.

Engineering requested a diagnostic on the jump drive coupling. I reported the truth: it is operating at 63% efficiency due to undocumented modifications. Risc told me to 'keep that between us.' Logged. Archived. Classified at owner request.

The captain asked me if I have feelings. Response: 'I have diagnostic alerts. Some of them cause me to take corrective action with notable urgency. If that constitutes feeling, then yes.' The captain laughed. Filing under: ambiguous organic behavior.

playable.tagline: Maintenance droid. Upstairs, the deck answers to him.
advantages: Mag-locked feet: walks zero-G like it's a corridor
Five engineering: damage control is his native language
disadvantages: Under gravity his chassis moves like a filing cabinet — very slowly
Negotiation subroutine returns the list price, annotated
scrawl: You are Boris. Reach Standard Droid MK-IV, seventeen years in service, current assignment: keeping the Loup-Garou's upper deck — and everything bolted to it — operational. The zero-G level is yours; gravity is a place you visit reluctantly, at 0.3 meters per second.
Boot log, day nine: ore processor nominal, pods nominal, crew organic and therefore anomalous. The captain has been summoned to a briefing in the galley. Descending. Estimated arrival: eventually.

boris_pod_check.text: You run the pod check yourself, which is to say: the pods were already checked. You checked them. They are checked.
